transactions.desc: The Chicago White Sox traded RHP Ben Peoples to the Texas Rangers.
The Texas Rangers traded C Ben Hartl to the Chicago White Sox.
The Mariners optioned Simpson to Triple-A Tacoma on Tuesday, Adam Jude of The Seattle Times reports.
The Mariners recalled Wilcox from Triple-A Tacoma on Tuesday, Adam Jude of The Seattle Times reports.
The Rockies optioned Sullivan to Triple-A Albuquerque on Tuesday.
The Rockies reinstated Gordon (hip) from the injured list ahead of his start Tuesday against the Marlins.
The Dodgers designated Hernandez for assignment Tuesday.
The Dodgers recalled Mills from Triple-A Oklahoma City on Tuesday.
The Marlins recalled Brzykcy from Triple-A Jacksonville on Tuesday.
The Marlins optioned Pauley to Triple-A Jacksonville on Tuesday.
The Marlins activated Hicks (back) from the 10-day injured list ahead of Tuesday's game against the Rockies.
The Diamondbacks recalled Pfaadt from Triple-A Reno ahead of his start Tuesday against the Giants.
The Diamondbacks optioned Burgos to Triple-A Reno on Tuesday.
The Brewers recalled Stallings from Triple-A Nashville on Tuesday.
The Rangers recalled Collyer from Triple-A Round Rock on Tuesday.
The Rangers designated Paddack for assignment Tuesday.
The Astros recalled Delgado from Triple-A Sugar Land on Tuesday, Bryan Hoch of MLB.com reports.
The Brewers optioned Gasser to the rookie-level ACL Brewers on Tuesday.
The Phillies optioned Shugart to Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Tuesday.
The Phillies selected Trivino's contract from Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Tuesday.
The Cardinals activated Fernandez (back) from the 15-day injured list Tuesday, Derrick Goold of the St. Louis Post-Dispatch reports.
The Blue Jays outrighted Woods Richardson to Triple-A Buffalo on Tuesday, Mitch Bannon of The Athletic reports.
Bodine has been promoted from High-A Bowling Green to Double-A Montgomery, Evan Closky of 10 Tampa Bay News reports.
The Reds optioned McCambley to Triple-A Louisville on Tuesday.
The Reds selected Johnson's contract from Triple-A Louisville on Tuesday, Charlie Goldsmith of Fox 19 Now Cincinnati reports.
The Reds reinstated Pagan (hamstring) from the 15-day injured list Tuesday.
The Yankees recalled Cruz from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Tuesday.
Morel agreed to a minor-league contract with the Mets on Tuesday, Will Sammon of The Athletic reports.
De Los Santos was optioned to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre after Monday's 7-3 loss to the Tigers. He allowed two unearned runs on two hits across two innings of relief.
The Dodgers optioned Ward to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Monday.
